sentences.english: Describe a tradition in your family or culture that is meaningful to you.
sentences.korean: 가족이나 문화에서 의미 있는 전통을 묘사하세요.

sentences.english: The tradition that means the most to me is Chuseok the Korean harvest festival when my entire extended family gathers at my grandparents' house.
sentences.korean: 나에게 가장 의미 있는 전통은 추석이에요. 한국의 추수 명절로 대가족 전체가 조부모 댁에 모여요.

sentences.english: We prepare traditional food together especially songpyeon which are rice cakes shaped by hand.
sentences.korean: 함께 전통 음식을 준비하는데 특히 손으로 빚는 떡인 송편이 있어요.

sentences.english: What makes it meaningful is that it's the only time each year when all my cousins aunts and uncles are in the same room.
sentences.korean: 의미 있게 만드는 것은 매년 모든 사촌 이모 삼촌이 같은 방에 있는 유일한 때라는 거예요.

sentences.english: In our busy modern lives we rarely see each other so Chuseok serves as a reminder of where we come from and the bonds that connect us.
sentences.korean: 바쁜 현대 생활에서 서로 거의 보지 못해 추석은 우리가 어디서 왔고 연결하는 유대가 무엇인지 상기시켜줘요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Attending a Large vs. Small School
Learning from Older vs. Younger People
